entities.name: TRANSDISCIPLINARY RESEARCH
entities.description: An approach to address complex real-world problems involving multiple disciplines and stakeholders

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER INVOLVEMENT
entities.description: A central aspect of transdisciplinarity involving the inclusion of stakeholders in the research process

entities.name: NORMATIVE OBJECTIVE
entities.description: A rationale for stakeholder involvement often viewed as a burden by scientists at the start of projects

entities.name: SUBSTANTIVE OBJECTIVE
entities.description: A rationale for stakeholder involvement closely linked to the core mandate of scientists

entities.name: SOCIAL-LEARNING OBJECTIVE
entities.description: A rationale for stakeholder involvement aimed at mutual learning between researchers and stakeholders

entities.name: IMPLEMENTATION OBJECTIVE
entities.description: A rationale for stakeholder involvement focused on the practical application of research findings

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LAND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The thematic focus of the collaborative research projects analyzed in the study

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: One of the regions where collaborative research projects on sustainable land management were conducted

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: One of the regions where collaborative research projects on sustainable land management were conducted

entities.name: SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: One of the regions where collaborative research projects on sustainable land management were conducted

entities.name: REFLECTIVE AND REFLEXIVE PRACTISE
entities.description: A systematic practice guided by a conceptual framework to support the planning and co-designing of research

relationships.description: Stakeholder involvement is a central aspect of transdisciplinary research
Normative objective is a general rationale for stakeholder involvement
Substantive objective is a general rationale for stakeholder involvement
Social-learning objective is a general rationale for stakeholder involvement
Implementation objective is a general rationale for stakeholder involvement
Research on sustainable land management was conducted in Southern Africa
Research on sustainable land management was conducted in Southeast Asia
Research on sustainable land management was conducted in South America
Reflective and reflexive practise supports the planning and co-designing of transdisciplinary research projects
Stakeholder involvement was integrated into projects dealing with sustainable land management
